valid.name: stable-defaults

invalid.name: random-default
invalid.code:
ALTER TABLE t ADD COLUMN x integer DEFAULT random();
ALTER TABLE t ADD COLUMN id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid();

errors.message: `random()` is VOLATILE — using it as a column DEFAULT on `ADD COLUMN` forces PostgreSQL to rewrite the entire table under `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE`. Add the column without a default, then `UPDATE` rows in batches.

`gen_random_uuid()` is VOLATILE — using it as a column DEFAULT on `ADD COLUMN` forces PostgreSQL to rewrite the entire table under `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE`. Add the column without a default, then `UPDATE` rows in batches.
